prompt: Edit image 1 by inserting the telephone icon from image 2 to the far right of the top navigation bar, next to the “Join Discord” button, scaled to match the button height and aligned horizontally. Below the “New episodes released every three weeks on Wednesday” text, add the red calendar icon from image 3, centered and resized to approximately half the width of the podcast platform buttons. All other aspects of the source image should remain unchanged.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the provided webpage screenshot, by inserting the blue telephone icon from image 2 into the top navigation bar. Position this icon to the immediate right of the green 'Join Discord' button, at the far right of the navigation bar, ensuring it is scaled to match the 'Join Discord' button's height and horizontally aligned with the other navigation links. Additionally, below the text 'New episodes released every three weeks on Wednesday', add the red calendar icon from image 3. Center this calendar icon horizontally beneath the text and resize its width to be approximately half the width of the podcast platform buttons, such as 'Watch on YouTube' or 'Listen on Spotify', found further down the page. All other elements of image 1 must remain entirely unchanged.
